name: PFIC Change of Business Exception

eligibility.description: Available to shareholders of foreign corporations in transition between active business operations, preventing accidental PFIC classification during the liquidation/reinvestment phase.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A corporation is not treated as a PFIC for a taxable year if its passive income is attributable to the disposition of active trades/businesses and it will not be a PFIC for the next two years.
